paper_title: Hippeastrum Species Study in Rio de Janeiro

methods.description: Process for collecting Hippeastrum species in their natural habitats, identifying, photographing, and preparing specimens for herbarium deposition.

steps.description: Conducted regular excursions over a two-year period in areas of restinga in the state of Rio de Janeiro, observing Hippeastrum species in their natural habitats.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct field excursions to observe and collect Hippeastrum species

steps.description: Specimens were identified, photographed and prepared with traditional techniques.
steps.searchable_summary: identify and photograph specimens, prepare for herbarium

steps.description: The specimens were then deposited in the Herbarium of the Biology Institute of the Federal University of Rio de Janeiro.

methods.description: Collection and preparation of Hippeastrum flowers or flower buds for palynological analysis using light microscopy and scanning electron microscopy.

steps.description: Collected flowers or flower buds of Hippeastrum species from established collections in herbaria.
Performed acetolysis with 60% lactic acid for light microscopy preparation.
Photomicrographs of pollen grains were obtained with a digital camera coupled to a microscope.
For SEM analyses, non-acetolyzed pollen grains were spread onto carbon tape, sputter-coated with palladium gold, and observed using SEM.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare and observe pollen grains using SEM

steps.description: A pollen key was prepared based on features observed under LM and SEM.
steps.searchable_summary: create pollen key from microscopy observations

methods.description: Measurement of pollen grain dimensions using light microscopy to assess morphological characteristics.

steps.description: Pollen grain measurements of standard specimens were taken under LM with an ocular micrometer.
steps.searchable_summary: measure pollen grain dimensions using ocular micrometer

steps.description: Measured largest and smallest equatorial diameters of 25 pollen grains in polar views.
steps.searchable_summary: measure equatorial diameters of pollen grains

steps.description: Measured polar and equatorial diameters of ten pollen grains in equatorial views.
steps.searchable_summary: measure polar and equatorial diameters in equatorial views

steps.description: Measured dimensions of colpi and exine layers, and lumen of the reticulum when possible.
steps.searchable_summary: measure colpi, exine layers, and reticulum lumen
